patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================
--- 
+++ 
@@ -1,24 +1,33 @@
-$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
+@echo off
+setlocal
 
-$root = Split-Path -Parent $PSScriptRoot
-$cloudflared = Get-Command cloudflared -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+:: Get project root (parent of the batch file's directory)
+for %%I in ("%~dp0..") do set "ROOT=%%~fI"
 
-if (-not $cloudflared) {
-    $fallbackPath = 'C:\Program Files (x86)\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe'
-    if (Test-Path $fallbackPath) {
-        $cloudflared = Get-Item $fallbackPath
-    }
-}
+:: Locate cloudflared
+where cloudflared >nul 2>&1
+if %ERRORLEVEL%==0 (
+    set "CLOUDFLARED=cloudflared"
+) else (
+    set "CLOUDFLARED=C:\Program Files (x86)\cloudflared\cloudflared.exe"
+    if not exist "%CLOUDFLARED%" (
+        echo cloudflared was not found. Install it with:
+        echo winget install --id Cloudflare.cloudflared -e
\ No newline at end of file
+        exit /b 1
+    )
+)
 
-if (-not $cloudflared) {
-    throw 'cloudflared was not found. Install it with: winget install --id Cloudflare.cloudflared -e'
-}
+:: Set port (default 8000 if PORT env var not defined)
+if defined PORT (
+    set "PORT_NUM=%PORT%"
+) else (
+    set "PORT_NUM=8000"
+)
 
-$port = if ($env:PORT) { $env:PORT } else { 8000 }
+pushd "%ROOT%"
 
-Push-Location $root
-try {
-    & $cloudflared.Source tunnel --url "http://127.0.0.1:$port" --no-autoupdate
-} finally {
-    Pop-Location
-}
+"%CLOUDFLARED%" tunnel --url "http://127.0.0.1:%PORT_NUM%" --no-autoupdate
+
+popd
+
+endlocal
\ No newline at end of file
